atlassian.description: Atlassian remote MCP server — provides Jira and Confluence tools for reading/creating issues, fetching ticket details, and creating subtasks. Used by the planner and swe agents.

serena.description: Serena semantic code toolkit for IDE-like code navigation and editing. Optimized for large repos (30k+ files). Use context 'claude-code' to avoid tool duplication with Claude Code built-ins.
